enabled.description: Enable the Hermes bridge HTTP route and optional tool.

mode.description: Execution mode. V1 tasks remain mock-safe unless a live template is explicitly added.

hermesMode.description: Hermes integration mode. Real mode requires a verified local Hermes checkout and rejects non-dry-run mock-only task execution.

hermesAgentPath.description: Local path to the official NousResearch/hermes-agent checkout used by the presence check and future real runtime adapter.

sharedSecretEnv.description: Environment variable that contains the Hermes bridge shared secret.

allowedTasks.description: Task template IDs Hermes may invoke.

allowedTools.description: OpenClaw tool capability names that approved task templates may use.

maxRequestBytes.description: Maximum JSON request body size accepted by the bridge route.
